ddls:
CREATE TABLE "orders" (
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer who placed the order */,
  "order_date" TEXT /* Date when the order was placed */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the order (e.g., pending, shipped, delivered) */,
  "shipping_address" TEXT /* Shipping address for the order */,
  "total_price" TEXT /* Total price of the order */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Payment method used for the order */,
  "payment_status" TEXT /* Status of the payment */,
  "shipping_carrier" TEXT /* Shipping carrier used for the order */,
  "shipping_cost" TEXT /* Cost of shipping */,
  "tax_amount" TEXT /* Tax amount for the order */,
  "discount_amount" TEXT /* Discount amount applied to the order */,
  "order_notes" TEXT /* Any notes or comments related to the order */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "customer_name" TEXT /* Full name of the customer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the customer */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the customer */,
  "city" TEXT /* City of the customer */,
  "state" TEXT /* State of the customer */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* Zip code of the customer */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of the customer */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the customer */,
  "loyalty_points" INTEGER /* Loyalty points of the customer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "order_items" (
  "order_item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order item */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* ID of the order this item belongs to */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product being ordered */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product ordered */,
  "price" TEXT /* Price of the product per unit */,
  "product_variant" TEXT /* Variant of the product */,
  "product_condition" TEXT /* Condition of the product */,
  "item_notes" TEXT /* Any notes or comments related to the order item */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "product_name" TEXT /* Name of the product */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the product */,
  "size" TEXT /* Size of the product */,
  "weight" TEXT /* Weight of the product */,
  "price" TEXT /* Price of the product */,
  "product_category" TEXT /* Category of the product */,
  "product_subcategory" TEXT /* Subcategory of the product */,
  "product_brand" TEXT /* Brand of the product */,
  "product_model" TEXT /* Model of the product */,
  "product_sku" TEXT /* Stock-keeping unit (SKU) of the product */,
  "product_gtin" TEXT /* Global trade item number (GTIN) of the product */,
  "product_mpn" TEXT /* Manufacturer part number (MPN) of the product */,
  "product_weight_unit" TEXT /* Unit of weight for the product */,
  "product_length_unit" TEXT /* Unit of length for the product */,
  "product_width_unit" TEXT /* Unit of width for the product */,
  "product_height_unit" TEXT /* Unit of height for the product */,
  "product_package_length" TEXT /* Length of the product package */,
  "product_package_width" TEXT /* Width of the product package */,
  "product_package_height" TEXT /* Height of the product package */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "suppliers" (
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each supplier */,
  "supplier_name" TEXT /* Name of the supplier */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Email address for contacting the supplier */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the supplier */,
  "supplier_type" TEXT /* Type of supplier */,
  "supplier_address" TEXT /* Address of the supplier */,
  "supplier_city" TEXT /* City of the supplier */,
  "supplier_state" TEXT /* State of the supplier */,
  "supplier_zip_code" TEXT /* Zip code of the supplier */,
  "supplier_country" TEXT /* Country of the supplier */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("supplier_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inventory" (
  "inventory_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inventory record */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product */,
  "quantity_on_hand" INTEGER /* Current quantity of the product in stock */,
  "warehouse_location" TEXT /* Location of the warehouse where the product is stored */,
  "warehouse_id" INTEGER /* ID of the warehouse where the product is stored */,
  "bin_location" TEXT /* Bin location of the product */,
  "inventory_status" TEXT /* Status of the inventory */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inventory_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_warehouse_id FOREIGN KEY ("warehouse_id") REFERENCES warehouse ("warehouse_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "shipments" (
  "shipment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each shipment */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* ID of the order being shipped */,
  "tracking_number" TEXT /* Tracking number for the shipment */,
  "shipment_date" TEXT /* Date when the shipment was sent */,
  "delivery_date" TEXT /* Expected delivery date */,
  "shipment_method" TEXT /* Shipping method used for the shipment */,
  "shipment_carrier" TEXT /* Shipping carrier used for the shipment */,
  "shipment_tracking_number" TEXT /* Tracking number for the shipment */,
  "shipment_cost" TEXT /* Cost of the shipment */,
  "shipment_notes" TEXT /* Any notes or comments related to the shipment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("shipment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_shipments_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "returns" (
  "return_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each return */,
  "order_item_id" INTEGER /* ID of the order item being returned */,
  "return_date" TEXT /* Date when the product was returned */,
  "reason" TEXT /* Reason for the return */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the return */,
  "return_reason" TEXT /* Reason for the return */,
  "return_resolution" TEXT /* Resolution for the return */,
  "return_notes" TEXT /* Any notes or comments related to the return */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("return_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_returns_order_item_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_item_id") REFERENCES order_items ("order_item_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "product_suppliers" (
  "product_supplier_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product-supplier relationship */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product */,
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* ID of the supplier */,
  "lead_time" INTEGER /* Lead time for the supplier to deliver the product */,
  "minimum_order_quantity" INTEGER /* Minimum order quantity for the product from the supplier */,
  "supplier_product_sku" TEXT /* Supplier's SKU for the product */,
  "supplier_product_gtin" TEXT /* Supplier's GTIN for the product */,
  "supplier_product_mpn" TEXT /* Supplier's MPN for the product */,
  "supplier_product_price" TEXT /* Supplier's price for the product */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_supplier_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_product_suppliers_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_product_suppliers_supplier_id FOREIGN KEY ("supplier_id") REFERENCES suppliers ("supplier_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "warehouse" (
  "warehouse_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each warehouse */,
  "warehouse_name" TEXT /* Name of the warehouse */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the warehouse */,
  "manager_name" TEXT /* Name of the warehouse manager */,
  "warehouse_address" TEXT /* Address of the warehouse */,
  "warehouse_city" TEXT /* City of the warehouse */,
  "warehouse_state" TEXT /* State of the warehouse */,
  "warehouse_zip_code" TEXT /* Zip code of the warehouse */,
  "warehouse_country" TEXT /* Country of the warehouse */,
  "warehouse_phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the warehouse */,
  "warehouse_email" TEXT /* Email of the warehouse */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("warehouse_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "product_warehouse" (
  "product_warehouse_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product-warehouse relationship */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product */,
  "warehouse_id" INTEGER /* ID of the warehouse */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product in the warehouse */,
  "product_warehouse_notes" TEXT /* Any notes or comments related to the product-warehouse relationship */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_warehouse_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_product_warehouse_warehouse_id FOREIGN KEY ("warehouse_id") REFERENCES warehouse ("warehouse_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_product_warehouse_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "product_sizes" (
  "size_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product size */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product */,
  "size_name" TEXT /* Name of the size */,
  "size_unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the size */,
  "size_value" TEXT /* Value of the size */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("size_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_product_sizes_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)
